filter.clamav_official_signatures_tooltip: Official ClamAV signatures use a large amount of memory, detect many old threats but are not very effective against the latest malware

filter.signatures_memory_warning: {installationNode} has less than {recommendedMemoryGb} GiB of RAM. You're strongly advised to keep ClamAV official signatures disabled to avoid memory filling

settings_mailboxes.title: Mailboxes settings
settings_mailboxes.sharedseen_explanation_tooltips: If enabled, a message is marked seen (read) by the first user that opens it, with effect for everyone else sharing the same mailbox
settings_mailboxes.move_spam_but_no_folder: If "Move spam to junk folder" is enabled, junk folder name is required

settings.networks_tooltip: Enter the IP addresses of legacy devices that need to send email messages without SMTP authentication. IPs listed here are exempt from authentication requirements.
settings.is_bcc_enabled_tooltips: When enabled, the specified address will receive a copy of every message sent or received through this server. This setting is useful for mail archiving solutions.
settings.enforce_sender_login_match_tooltip: The mail sender address must match the SMTP/AUTH login name. Enable this check to avoid the unauthorized use of email addresses and the sender address spoofing.
settings.networks_helper: One address per line, in IPv4/6 CIDR format
settings.networks_label: Allow relay from these IP addresses

relay.delete_default_rule: Delete default rule? Messages will be routed according to remaining rules and DNS-based SMTP rules.
